commit_scope: Add Jean-Luc Golden Codes transmission, promote missing vision-KB markdown surfaces into first-class substrate domains, and migrate substrate category numbers to an intentional numeric schema.

commands: python3 -m py_compile api/app/services/substrate/category.py api/app/services/substrate/markdown_frontend.py api/app/services/substrate/__init__.py api/app/services/substrate/form.py scripts/coh_substrate.py

cd api && /Users/ursmuff/source/Coherence-Network/api/.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_substrate.py tests/test_substrate_numeric_schema.py tests/test_substrate_form.py tests/test_substrate_form_bml_state.py tests/test_substrate_form_runtime.py tests/test_substrate_form_self_hosted.py tests/test_substrate_form_extensions.py tests/test_substrate_recipe_eval.py
local_validation.summary: Golden Codes transmission is source-marked and indexed. Transmission, resource, guide, language_view, and kb_page surfaces are first-class substrate domains. Domain category numbers now follow intentional bands, documented in numeric-schema.md and guarded by test_substrate_numeric_schema.py. Local substrate tables were reset and rebuilt from source; kb-sync-audit is clean with 115 concepts, 10 transmissions, 9 resources, 13 guides, 4 language views, and 19 KB pages. Maintainability baseline was refreshed to the current mainline body-state after guard reported stale thresholds; rerun shows regression: no. Runtime web guard normalized cli/package-lock.json to match the existing cli/package.json 0.13.3 version.

deploy_validation.details: No deploy attempted yet; production/shared substrate DBs must run reset/backfill after code lands.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Agents and CLI users can annotate and query transmission, resource, guide, language_view, and kb_page cells as first-class substrate domains with intentional domain category coordinates.
test_flows: Reset and rebuild substrate tables from source markdown.
Query Form trivial refs and confirm ~Concept=@1.2.4.1, ~Memory=@1.2.4.6, ~Transmission=@1.2.4.10.
Run kb-sync-audit --strict after rebuild and verify no missing, stale, path-drift, or wrong-domain concept rows.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI, PR review, and deploy/shared DB rebuild remain pending.
